description: Composition Brown leggings made of 100% cotton, has an elasticated waist and stitch detailing Fit Slim-fit Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Sylish and in-vogue, this pair of leggings from w has an added hint of retro chic, making it a contemporary essential. The luxe, stretchy fabric is designed to fit to your shape, making sure every day is perfect for leggings. Style this with any kurta and clunky heels or with a tunic and belt. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8”, waist 26” and hips 36”
